evals.prompt: Migrate this repo from Claude Code to pi. Set up everything needed.
expectations: Should discover existing .claude/ setup (skills, hooks, commands, agents)
Should consolidate MCP servers into ~/.config/mcp/mcp.json
Should create .pi/ directory with skills, extensions, prompts, agents
Should port hooks to TypeScript extensions
Should convert commands to prompt templates
Should verify MCP connectivity with a live query
Should NOT overwrite .claude/ directory

evals.prompt: Set up pi on this Mac for my existing Claude Code project.
expectations: Should install pi and pi-mcp-adapter if not present
Should configure models.json with Keychain credentials
Should link skills from .claude/skills/ to .pi/skills/
Should create settings.json with defaultModel
Should verify pi loads correctly

evals.prompt: I want to switch from Claude to a different AI coding tool.
Port my Claude Code hooks to pi extensions.
expectations: Should read all .claude/hooks/*.sh files
Should map each hook to the correct pi event type
Should create TypeScript extensions in .pi/extensions/
Should translate tool matchers from mcp__server__tool to server_tool format
Should verify extensions load without errors

evals.prompt: Check if my pi migration is complete.
expectations: Should inventory .pi/ directory (extensions, prompts, skills, agents)
Should verify MCP connectivity
Should check that hooks are ported
Should run smoke tests (skills load, prompts discover, models work)
Should report readiness score
